ModuleMessage.Subject: H:CS3 H:CS4 for your attention.
ModuleMessage.Text:
You've been selected for distribution of the item described below.
Item: H:CS4 Created: H:ON Closed Date: H:D7
Description: H:CL1
Please logon to your DevonWay dashboard and search for this item if you'd like more information.
Thank You,
DevonWay Administrators

ModuleMessage.Subject: #{IF(&Status = 'CL', 'Closure', 'Cancellation')} Notice for H:CS4
ModuleMessage.Text:
You requested email notification upon closure. Created Date: H:ON H:P1:Meaning Date: H:D1 Brief Description: H:CS1 Description: Substring(H:CL1,0,1000)#{IF(Length(H:CL1)>1000,'...','')}#{IF(&Status='CA','

Reason for Cancellation: '|GetCancelReason(),'')}
Login
Thank You, DevonWay Administrators

ModuleMessage.Subject: Comment added to H:CS4
ModuleMessage.Text:
#{List(C1:N1|') ['|C1:CS1|'] '|VAL(XH:FullName, &Module = "PERSON" AND XH:Enabled != NULL AND &ID = C1:U1)|' ('|DateToString(C1:D1,'MM/dd/yyyy')||C1:T1|'):
'|C1:CL1|'',C1:N1=max(C1:N1),'')}
Created On:DateToString(H:ON,'dd MMM yyyy') Title: H:CS1 Description: Substring(H:CL1,0,1000)#{IF(Length(H:CL1)>1000,'...','')} Action Owner: H:R8:CS1
View Details
#{List(C1:N1|') ['|C1:CS1|'] '|VAL(XH:FullName, &Module = "PERSON" AND XH:Enabled != NULL AND &ID = C1:U1)|' ('|DateToString(C1:D1,'dd MMMMM yyyy')||C1:T1|'):
'|C1:CL1|'
','')}

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: H:N5 != NULL AND H:P1:CODE = 'INVK-GACT-P1-1' AND NUM(T:TaskName) < 1

ModuleRuleTarget.TargetUserLogic: XH:P1:CODE = 'INVK-PER-P1-1' AND XH:U1 != NULL AND XH:RA = H:RA
IF(C1:CID=NULL, /** if for some reason a Person object doesn't initially exist, don't try when the next person saves **/ VAL(&ID, &Module='INVK-PER' and XH:U1=&PersonID and XH:U1>0), C1:R1 )
XH:P1:CODE = 'INVK-PER-P1-1' AND XH:U1 != NULL AND &ID NOT IN LIST(C2:R1)
XH:P1:CODE = 'INVK-PER-P1-1' AND XH:U1 != NULL AND XH:RA = H:RA

XH:P1:Code='INVK-PER-P1-1' AND XH:U1 <> NULL AND XH:U1 IN /* This SQL returns users with access to the reporting authority of the target object*/ (ExecuteSQL(" SET NOCOUNT ON; DECLARE @List varchar(8000); SELECT @List = COALESCE(@List + ',', '')+CAST(PR.Person_ID AS varchar(10)) FROM dbo.wway_Person_Role PR INNER JOIN wway_Person_Role_Reporting PRRA ON PRRA.Person_Role_ID = PR.Person_Role_ID INNER JOIN wway_Reporting_Authority RA ON RA.Reporting_Authority_Code = PRRA.Reporting_Authority_Code WHERE PR.Role_Code IN (SELECT MODULE_ROLE_CODE FROM WWAY_MODULE_ROLE WHERE MODULE_CODE = '"|H:MODULE|"') AND PR.Active = 'Y' AND RA.child_authorities LIKE '%'+'"|H:RA:CODE|"'+'%' SELECT @List"))

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: C1:U1 != &PersonID /** Comment By != Current User **/ and &Role != 'INVK-D' /** Debug **/ and &Role != 'INVK-A' /** Admin **/ and &Role != 'INVK-C' /** Coordinator **/

ModuleRuleName.Name: Comment Not Made by Signed On User; Not Admin/Coordinator/Debug
Reassign this Task != NULL; On Save
Reassign this Task = Person Reference; On Save

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: H:VR1=H:R3 /** Reassign this Task = Current Assignee **/
(&Stage = 'SAVE' OR &Stage = 'COMPLETE') AND H:N2 > GetLastSavedValue(H:N2) AND H:N2 !=0

ModuleRuleTarget.TargetUserLogic: VAL(C1:D1, C1:CID=NULL AND C1:N1 = MAX(C1:N1))/** Using field and not &Today to potentially clear out the value if new comment is deleted**/
VAL(C1:U1, C1:CID=NULL AND C1:N1 = MAX(C1:N1))/** Using field and not &Today to potentially clear out the value if new comment is deleted**/

ModuleRuleName.Name: REQ - Initiate Fields: Action not already complete

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: H:ID = NULL AND H:VN1 = NULL AND &Stage = NULL
&Role != 'INVK-D' /** Debug **/ and &Role != 'INVK-A' /** Admin **/ and &Role != 'INVK-C' /** Coordinator **/ AND !(H:P1:CODE = 'INVK-GACT-P1-2' AND H:R6:U1 = &PersonID)
((&HighlightedTask = NULL AND H:ID != NULL) OR H:P1:Factor > 1010) AND H:VP2:CODE != 'INVK-GACT-VP2-1'
H:R4:N9 > 4010 /** CAPA past Implementation **/ OR ( H:VP2:CODE != 'INVK-GACT-VP2-1' and &Role != 'INVK-C' /** Coordinator **/ )

ModuleRuleName.Name: Lock - Outside of Implementation: Not Admin or Coordinator

ModuleWorkflowEvent.UserGuidance: Verify action taken is in accordance with described action.
